programs.title: 6-Week Optimization Program
programs.shortDescription: An intensive 6-week reset combining lab testing, nutrition coaching, and movement programming to kickstart durable change.
programs.fullDescription:
The 6-Week Optimization Program is our flagship intensive — designed for people who want a focused, measurable reset across all four pillars: nutrition, metabolic health, physical resilience, and nervous system regulation. You'll start with a comprehensive lab panel and baseline assessment so we understand exactly where you are today.

From there, your coach builds a personalized plan covering nutrition, training, sleep, and stress. You'll meet 1:1 every week, with a one-week CGM trial mid-program so we can see — in real data — how your body responds to your current habits and adjust in real time.

This program is ideal for clients who want clear structure, accountability, and a measurable before/after — and who are ready to invest six focused weeks into building habits that last.

programs.title: VIP Coaching
programs.shortDescription: Ongoing, high-touch coaching for clients who want continuous support, accountability, and access to the full HODA team.
programs.fullDescription:
VIP Coaching is for clients who want HODA in their corner every day. You'll have unlimited messaging access to your coach, monthly lab reviews, and quarterly in-depth reassessments so your plan evolves with your body, your goals, and your season of life.

VIP clients also get priority scheduling across our specialists — physician, strength coach, nutrition coach, and nervous system specialist — so getting the right answer fast is never the bottleneck.

This is the right fit for high-performers, executives, and parents who want ongoing accountability and access without rebooking a new program every quarter.

programs.title: Workshops & Seminars
programs.shortDescription: Group sessions on specific topics — sleep, stress resilience, metabolic health, and more — open to the community.
programs.fullDescription:
Our Workshops & Seminars are focused, expert-led sessions on the topics our clients ask about most: sleep, stress resilience, metabolic health, strength after 40, hormone changes, and more. Each session combines clear science with practical, take-home strategies.

Workshops run 1–3 hours depending on the topic, with live Q&A and a downloadable resource guide for every attendee. We offer both in-person and virtual formats.

Workshops are open to non-clients — they're a great way to explore the HODA approach before committing to a full program.

programs.title: Corporate Wellness
programs.shortDescription: Bring HODA's integrated approach to your team — workshops, assessments, and ongoing programs for organizations.
programs.fullDescription:
Corporate Wellness brings the full HODA approach to your team. We design custom programs for organizations — combining group workshops, individual assessments, and ongoing coaching tracks for employees who want deeper support.

Delivery is flexible: on-site at your office, virtual across distributed teams, or a hybrid of both. Programs are scoped to your goals — reducing burnout, improving energy and focus, supporting executive performance, or building a longer-term culture of health.

We also provide aggregate outcome reporting so HR and leadership can see the impact, while individual employee data stays private.
